problem: Rectangle $ABCD$ has area $2006.$ An ellipse with area $2006\pi$ passes through $A$ and $C$ and has foci at $B$ and $D$. What is the perimeter of the rectangle?

classified_questions.question: Describe the given problem and the information provided.
classified_questions.label: f

classified_questions.label: r

classified_questions.label: b

classified_questions.question: Why is the length of the diagonal of the rectangle equal to the distance between the foci of the ellipse?
classified_questions.label: r

classified_questions.label: b
